svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="rFovB-Ue-uRXeb09sMee" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1228" dy="895" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.basic.rect;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;rounded=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="浏览器 / 移动端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=40;notch=0;fillColor=#6c8ebf;strokeColor=none;rotation=-90;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="200" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;align=center;" value="HTTPS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="40" x="200" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;arcSize=10;" value="Spring Cloud Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="220" x="280" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="JWT 校验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="300" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="接口限流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="400" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="令牌黑名单" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="300" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="XSS 过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="400" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="CORS / 安全头" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="340" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=40;notch=0;fillColor=#b85450;strokeColor=none;rotation=-90;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="500" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Auth Server
(授权服务器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="580" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Order Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="580" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Stock Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="580" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Pay Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="580" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="12" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="13" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="14" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" target="15" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;size=15;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;" value="Redis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="80" x="580" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;size=15;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;" value="MySQL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="80" x="680" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="20" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="21" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="20" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 5;arcSize=8;" value="安全层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="280" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;" value="XSS 过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="70" x="290" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;" value="CSRF 防护" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="70" x="370" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;" value="接口限流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="70" x="290" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;" value="令牌黑名单" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="70" x="370" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#82b366;align=center;" value="令牌签发 / 刷新 / 撤销" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="555" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=11;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" value="JWT 校验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="610" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673a6;align=center;" value="令牌状态 / 限流计数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="550" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
